justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified "tomorrow" as May 26th and offered relevant slots.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully offered available slots for the requested time and topic without needing further clarification.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just two turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth, professional, and resulted in a successful booking, providing a positive customer experience.
